repos.description: Vault Tas is an app produced by Inter-Tas. This app can provide opportunities to tourism and local business. Tasmania is a state that rich in history, there are historical sites nearly everywhere around Tasmania. People can miss a lot of stuff while on their trip to Tasmania. This is where our app comes into play, this app will use the user’s location and inform them if there’s any heritage site near them by using heritage data stored in datasets. This will be a great help to the tourists as well as government to promote tourism across Tasmania. QR codes can be set across Tasmania near all historic sites in Tasmania through which Tasmanian history can be viewed using advanced phones AR technology or VR as well if you really want to immerse yourselves into the history of Tasmania. People can also take pictures in the AR environment (such as historical buildings, etc.) , this will make tourism very enjoyable while visiting and engage. All Tasmanian important events such as Dark Mofo can also be viewed using this app in AR and VR. It will create excitement among people in joining the event whenever it occurs.Scanning these QR codes will store all historical information in the app’s database of the user which user can use to study more about Tasmania history. Historians will have great benefit using this app. Moreover, this app will also support rewards system by using which users will be able to get discounts at historic sites salamanca market, Port Arthur, local restaurants etc. This will help in promoting Tasmania across Tourists which will increase commercial businesses revenue as well.

While it might seem okay to use whatever moving boxes you have lying around, you’re actually putting delicate items at risk.  Old boxes might not be as sturdy as they once were, causing your items to fall out. And boxes that aren’t the right size for your items could lead them to rattle around and break. Whatever the case, there is a lot that can go wrong when using old boxes.  Instead of potentially ruining your prized possessions, you should consider buying moving boxes from Price’s Removals & Storage. All of our boxes are specially made to handle fragile items, like china, glass, books and clothing.  Keep Your Things Safe Whether you’re moving locally or across the country, you should make sure your items are secure. At Price’s Removals & Storage, we are committed to making sure your items arrive at your new home safely, which is why we use boxes that are designed to handle the stress of a move.  You have the option of using our boxes to pack your belongings yourself or letting us pack your things for you. Either way, you’ll have the peace of mind that your items are packed safely and correctly. See our list of available boxes below to figure out which dimensions will be right for you.  Contact Us Today If you’re getting ready for a move to or from Tasmania, contact Price’s Removals & Storage. We can provide you with the moving boxes you need to pack your belongings and send them safely to your new home. Call us on 1-800-030-200 to discuss any questions or concerns you may have.
